0.description: This group consists of individuals who achieved quick and sustained success with Zyban, with most reporting long-term abstinence from smoking.

1.description: This group consists of individuals who have been successfully using Vivitrol for an extended period, often with long-term sobriety and confidence in their recovery.

2.description: This group consists of patients who have achieved long-term success with Suboxone, with many expressing gratitude and confidence in their sobriety.

3.description: This group consists of individuals who have successfully quit smoking with the help of Chantix, often experiencing rapid reduction in smoking within a short period of time.

4.description: Patients in this group are actively working to change, having recently gone through alcohol withdrawal and receiving Librium as part of their treatment.

5.description: This group consists of individuals who have achieved long-term sobriety with the help of Campral, reporting significant improvements in their mental and physical well-being.

6.description: Patients who successfully quit smoking within a short period (3 weeks) after taking Chantix, with minimal side effects and long-term success.

7.description: This group consists of individuals who have successfully quit smoking with Chantix and have maintained their sobriety for an extended period.

8.description: This group consists of individuals who have successfully quit smoking with Chantix for an extended period, often after multiple failed attempts.

9.description: Patients who successfully quit smoking within a short period (2-8 days) using Chantix, often with some side effects.
